UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION
FORM 8-K

Trading Symbol: BIGA
Title of each class: Class A Common Stock
Name of each exchange on which registered: The New York Stock Exchange

Item 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement.

Item 3.02 Unregistered Sales of Equity Securities.

On January 5, 2026, BigAI Holdings Inc. (the "Company") closed a private
placement of $2.5 billion of convertible preferred shares to a consortium
of strategic and sovereign investors including NVIDIA Corporation, MGX Fund
Management, Public Investment Fund of Saudi Arabia, and SoftBank Vision Fund.

The convertible preferred shares have a conversion price of $120.50 per share.

The consortium investment is intended to fund the Company's expansion of
AI data center capacity in partnership with NVIDIA.

Item 9.01 Financial Statements and Exhibits.

99.1 Press Release announcing strategic investment.
